analytics.totalDealsTooltip: Count de every negocio in este funil that isn't marked as Lost. Won negocios are still included.
analytics.pipelineValueTooltip: Sum de o dollar values de todos negocios in este funil, excluding negocios marked as Lost.
analytics.avgDealSizeTooltip: Funil Value divided by Total Negocios — o average value de a single nenhumn-lost negocio.
analytics.weightedValueTooltip: Expected revenue: each aberto negocio's value × its stage probability. First stage ≈ 10%, stages progress up para 90%, Won = 100%. Lost negocios are excluded.
analytics.wonThisMonthTooltip: Negocios marked as Won since o first dia de o current mes.
analytics.lostThisMonthTooltip: Negocios marked as Lost since o first dia de o current mes.

list.deleteDesc: Este permanently removes {name} e its execution history. Este cannenhumt be undone.

builder.replyIdsHelp: Comma-separated button/list-row ids para match, exact. Use o same ids voce set on a Enviar Buttons / Enviar List step.

config.closeConversationHint: Sets o conversa status para "fechard". Nenhum configuracao needed.

list.title: Fluxos
list.description: Build branching, button-driven WhatsApp conversas. Useful para menus, FAQs, e triage antes a human steps in.
list.deleteConfirm: Excluir "{name}"? Any ativo runs will end immidiately.

list.createDesc: Start de a modelo ou build de scratch.
list.triggerFirstInbound: Triggers on a contato's first-ever inbound mensagem

logs.title: Runs
logs.description: The 50 most recent times este flow ran. Expand a row para see o engine's per-step log.
logs.emptyState: Nenhum runs yet. Trigger o flow de a personal WhatsApp number para see it appear aqui.
logs.noEvents: Nenhum events recorded para este run.

builder.nodesEmpty: Adicionar a Start nenhumde, then a Enviar buttons nenhumde, then a Handoff — that's o welcome-menu shape de o brief.
builder.nodeKeyLabel: Nenhumde key (internal identifier — keep stable para analytics)
builder.replyIdsHint: Responder IDs para each option are shown inline acima. They're returned by WhatsApp when a customer taps; voce usutodosy don't need para touch them.
builder.noNodeDesc: Selecionar a nenhumde on o canvas para editar its configuracao.

form.varKeyLabel: Variable key (stored in flow_runs.vars; alphanumeric + underscore)
form.varKeyHelp: Interpolate in downstream prompts e handoff nenhumtes com
form.internalNote: Internal nenhumte (for o agent picking up)
form.endNodeHelp: Terminal nenhumde. When o runner reaches este nenhumde o run is marked complete. Nenhum config needed.
form.buttonsHelp: Buttons (1–3) — each one routes para a different next nenhumde
form.filenameLabel: Arquivonenhumme shown para o customer (documentos somente)

members.title: Membros da equipe
members.description: People com access para este account. Roles control what each teammate can do.
members.inviteHint: The plaintext invite URL is somente shown once at creation para security — para re-share, revoke o invite abaixo e criar a nenhumvo one.
members.noPendingDesc: Clique <bold>Invite member</bold> acima para generate a shareable link.
members.removeDialogDesc: Remove <bold>{name}</bold> de o account? They'll be signed out de este account e given a fresh personal account on their next sign-in. Their login isn't excluird.

invite.inviteCreatedDesc: Share este link com seu nenhumvo teammate. They'll be able para sign up (or entrar) e join o account as <bold>{role}</bold>. The link is valido para <bold>{days} {dias, plural, =1 {day} other {days}}</bold>.
invite.saveLinkHint: We never store o plaintext — once voce fechar este dialog o URL is gone. To re-share, revoke este invite e criar a nenhumvo one.
invite.dialogDesc: Generate a one-time invite link. Share it via WhatsApp, Slack, ou any channel voce like — nenhum e-mail service obrigatorio.
invite.labelHint: Helps voce remember who voce enviado o link para in o pendente list abaixo.
invite.labelTooLong: Label must be {max} characters ou fewer
invite.clipboardBlocked: Clipboard blocked — copiar o link manutodosy
invite.whatsappMessage: Join {accountName} on wacrm using este link (valido para {expiresInDays} dias): {url}

tagsAndFields.title: Campos e tags
tagsAndFields.description: Two ways para organize contatos: colour-coded tags para quick grouping, e custom campos para structured data.
tagsAndFields.tagsDesc: Colour-coded labels para grouping e filtraring contatos.
tagsAndFields.fieldsDesc: Extra contato campos (ex. ZIP code, lead source). They appear on every contato e in o “Atualizar Contato Campo” automacao action.
tagsAndFields.noTags: Nenhum tags yet — criar seu first one abaixo.
tagsAndFields.deleteConfirm: Excluir o tag "{name}"? Este removes it de todos contatos e cannenhumt be undone.

templates.title: Mensagem modelos
templates.description: Criar modelos e submit them para Meta para approval. Use "Sync de Meta" para pull modelos approved elsewaqui.
templates.syncTitle: Pull approved modelos de seu Meta WhatsApp Business Account
templates.createFirst: Criar seu first mensagem modelo para get started.
templates.editTitle: Editaring triggers Meta re-rever — status flips para PENDING.
templates.resubmitTitle: Editar o modelo e resubmit para Meta para rever.
templates.deleteMetaLocallyAria: Excluir modelo de Meta e loctodosy
templates.dialogEditDesc: Salvar seu changes para re-submit para Meta. Status will flip back para PENDING during rever.
templates.dialogNewDesc: Build a modelo e submit it para Meta para approval. Once approved, voce can use it in disparos e o inbox.
templates.authWarning: AUTHENTICATION modelos have a fixed body + OTP button shape that needs a different builder. Criar them in Meta WhatsApp Gerenciarr para nenhumw e use <bold>Sync de Meta</bold> para bring them in.
templates.nameFixed: Nenhumme is fixed once a modelo exists on Meta — criar a nenhumvo modelo para change it.
templates.nameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, e underscores somente.
templates.langFixed: Language is fixed once a modelo exists on Meta.
templates.langHint: Must match o exact code on Meta — en_US e en are distinct.
templates.headerSamplePlaceholder: Sample value para {{1}} (obrigatorio para Meta rever)
templates.imageHint: Enviar arquivo a JPEG/PNG (≤5 MB, ≥800×418 px recommended) ou paste a public HTTPS link — we enviar arquivo it para Meta para rever automatictodosy.
templates.mediaHint: Must be a publicly accessible HTTPS link. Meta fetches it once during rever, so it needs para stay live para ~24 hrs.
templates.bodyHint: Use {{1}}, {{2}} para variables (must be contiguous starting at {{1}}).
templates.sampleValues: Sample values (Meta uses these para rever seu modelo)
templates.buttonsLimit: Up para {max} buttons. QUICK_REPLY buttons must come antes URL / telefone / copiar-code buttons.
templates.urlSamplePlaceholder: Example value para {{1}} (obrigatorio when URL has a variable)
templates.deleteMetaDesc: "{name}" will be excluird de Meta e de wacrm. Ativo disparos using este modelo will start failing on their next enviar. Este can't be undone.
templates.deleteLocalDesc: "{name}" will be excluird de wacrm. It was never submitted para Meta, so nenhum remote cleanup is needed.
templates.toastSubmitEditSuccess: Editar submitted — Meta typictodosy revers comin 24 horas.
templates.toastSubmitNewSuccess: Submitted para Meta — typical rever time is 24 horas. Status atualizars automatictodosy.
templates.toastSyncTruncated: Synced o first 2000 modelos somente — seu account has more. Sync again para continue, ou contato support if este persists.
templates.toastInvalidImage: Header imagem must be a JPEG ou PNG.
templates.toastImageTooLarge: Imagem is {size} MB — Meta's limit is 5 MB.

roles.ownerHint: Full control over account e billing

whatsapp.title: Conexao do WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Conecte sua API WhatsApp Business da Meta. Credenciais, webhook e passos de configuracao ficam aqui.
whatsapp.connectedDesc: Seu token de acesso autentica com a Meta. Veja o status de registro abaixo para saber se os webhooks estao conectados.
whatsapp.notConnectedDesc: Configure suas credenciais da API Meta para conectar sua conta WhatsApp Business.
whatsapp.registered: Registrado - a Meta enviara eventos para o wacrm
whatsapp.notRegistered: Nao registrado - a Meta nao enviara eventos
whatsapp.subscribedSince: Subscribed since {date}. Clique Verify com Meta if events stop arriving.
whatsapp.retryHint: Informe (or correct) o 2-step PIN abaixo e clique Salvar Configuracao para retry.
whatsapp.noRegistrationHint: Este number was salvard antes registration tracking existed, ou registration was skipped. Informe o 2-step PIN abaixo e clique Salvar Configuracao para subscribe it.
whatsapp.apiCredentialsDesc: Informe seu Meta API WhatsApp Business credenciais.
whatsapp.tokenHidden: Token is hidden para security. Re-informe it para atualizar configuracao.
whatsapp.webhookVerifyTokenHint: A custom string voce criar. Must match o token voce set in Meta webhook configuracoes.
whatsapp.twoStepPin: PIN de verificacao em duas etapas
whatsapp.pinHint: Needed somente para wire inbound mensagems para a production number. Set it in Meta Business Gerenciarr → WhatsApp Accounts → Telefone Numbers → Two-step verification, then paste it aqui so wacrm can subscribe o number — otherwise Meta routes inbound events para whichever app last claimed it (the symptom that hits second numbers under a shared WABA). Meta test numbers have nenhum PIN e are pre-registered — leave este blank para them. Leaving it blank also keeps an existing registration untouched.
whatsapp.webhookDesc: Use este URL as seu webhook ctodosback in o Meta App Dashboard.
whatsapp.setupInstructionsDesc: Follow these steps para conectar seu API WhatsApp Business.
whatsapp.step1_4: Fill in app details e criar
whatsapp.step2_1: In seu app dashboard, clique "Adicionar Product"
whatsapp.step2_3: Follow o setup wizard para link seu business
whatsapp.step3_3: Copiar seu WhatsApp Business Account ID
whatsapp.step3_4: Generate a Permanent Access Token de Business Configuracoes > System Users
whatsapp.step4_3: Paste o Webhook Ctodosback URL de acima
whatsapp.step4_4: Informe o same Verify Token voce set aqui
whatsapp.metaDocs: Documentacao da API WhatsApp da Meta

profile.title: Seu perfil
profile.description: How voce show up across o app. Seu avatar e nenhumme appear in o header, sidebar, e anywaqui seu teammates see voce.
profile.photoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, ou GIF. Up para 2 MB.
profile.emailChangeHint: Confira a caixa de entrada de <bold>{oldEmail}</bold> e <bold>{newEmail}</bold> - os dois enderecos precisam confirmar antes da alteracao valer.
profile.unsupportedImageDesc: Use PNG, JPG, WebP, ou GIF.
profile.profileSavedEmailCheck: Perfil salvard — check seu e-mail para confirm o adicionarress change
profile.passwordDesc: Use at least {min} characters. Voce will stay signed in on este device depois changing it.
profile.cannotChangeNoEmail: Nao e possivel change senha comout a current e-mail
profile.passwordTooShort: Senha must be at least {min} characters
profile.passwordMismatch: Nenhumvo senha e confirmation do nenhumt match
profile.sessionsDesc: Sair de every device waqui voce're logged in — including este one. Useful if voce lost a laptop ou shared seu senha.
profile.signOutConfirmDesc: Every device logged into este account will be signed out e will need para log in again. Voce will be redirected para o login page.

appearance.title: Aparencia
appearance.description: Set o mode e accent colour used across o app. Salvard para este device — try it, it changes live.

security.title: Login e seguranca
security.description: Change seu senha e sair de seu devices. These keep seu account safe.

apiKeys.title: Chaves de API
apiKeys.description: Keys authenticate o public REST API (<apiCode>/api/v1</apiCode>) so voce can build seu own automacaos. Enviar them as <headerCode>Authorization: Bearer <key></headerCode>.
apiKeys.createOneHint: Clique <bold>Nenhumvo API key</bold> para criar one.
apiKeys.askAdminHint: Ask an admin para criar one.
apiKeys.scopesHint: A key com nenhum scopes can still ctodos GET /api/v1/me para verify it works.
apiKeys.copyDesc: Este is o somente time o full key is shown. Store it somewaqui safe — if voce lose it, revoke it e criar a nenhumvo one.
apiKeys.copyFailed: Copiar failed — selecionar e copiar manutodosy
apiKeys.newKeyDesc: Nenhumme it depois o integration that will use it, e grant somente o scopes it needs.
apiKeys.networkError: Nao foi possivel reach o server

deals.title: Negocios e moeda
deals.description: The currency used para nenhumvo negocios e para funil e dashboard totals.
deals.defaultCurrencyDesc: Nenhumvo negocios default para este currency, e funil e dashboard totals are shown in it. Existing negocios keep o currency they were salvard com.
deals.adminOnlyHint: Only account admins can change o default currency.

aiConfig.title: Configuracao do agente
aiConfig.description: Bring seu own AbertoIA ou Anthropic key. wacrm ctodoss o provider directly com seu key — nenhum per-seat IA fees, e seu data stays seus. Este powers IA-drafted replies in o inbox, o auto-resposta bot, e o Playground.
aiConfig.adminOnlyConfig: Only admins e owners can change o IA configuracao.
aiConfig.encryptionNotice: Seu key is encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) e never shown again depois saving.
aiConfig.testNetworkError: Nao foi possivel reach o provider.
aiConfig.embeddingsHint: An AbertoIA key used somente para embed seu knenhumwledge base (text-embedding-3-smtodos){sameKeyText}. Leave blank para use keyword buscar instead. Clear it para turn semantic buscar off.
aiConfig.sameKeyText: — can be o same key as acima
aiConfig.behaviourDesc: Tell o assistente about seu business — products, tone, what it may e may nenhumt promise. Este context feeds both drafts e auto-replies.
aiConfig.promptPlaceholder: ex. We are Acme, a coffee-equipment store. Be warm e concise. Never quote prices ou delivery dates — hand off para a human para those.
aiConfig.enableAssistantDesc: Master switch. Turns on o “Draft com IA” button in o inbox.
aiConfig.autoReplyDesc: The bot answers nenhumvo inbound mensagems automatictodosy (somente when nenhum flow handles them e nenhum agent is assigned). Hands off para a human when it can’t help.
aiConfig.maxAutoRepliesDesc: After este many bot replies in one thread, o bot goes quiet.
aiConfig.handoffToDesc: When o bot can’t help — ou hits o resposta cap — it pauses e routes o chat aqui, com a short nenhumte on what happened.
aiConfig.handoffQueue: Unassigned queue (any agent can pick it up)

aiKnowledge.title: Base de conhecimento
aiKnowledge.description: Adicionar FAQs, policies, ou product details. The assistente retrieves o relevant pieces when drafting e auto-respostaing, so it can answer instead de handing off.{searchType}
aiKnowledge.semanticSearchOn: Semantic buscar is on (embeddings key set).
aiKnowledge.keywordSearchOn: Using keyword buscar — adicionar an embeddings key acima para semantic buscar.
aiKnowledge.editDocContentPlaceholder: Paste o FAQ answer, policy text, ou product details…
aiKnowledge.reindexTooltip: Re-embed todos documentos (ex. depois adicionaring an embeddings key)
